BTC.reasoning: Extreme Fear with falling OI and near-neutral funding points to advanced deleveraging (contrarian lean), yet persistent taker sell pressure and price downtrend keep momentum bearish. Signals conflict, no clear edge.

ETH.reasoning: Extreme Fear weighed as momentum (not contrarian) because OI remains elevated, longs crowded (>2.4), and consistent taker selling (<1) indicate deleveraging incomplete and downside pressure persists.
